programs.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programs.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programs.title: I Survived
programs.desc: Two gunmen abduct and assault a 16-year-old girl; a deer hunter drags himself up a dry creek bed after falling out of a tree and breaking both legs; a college student becomes a gunman's human shield.

programs.title: I Survived
programs.desc: A woman fights back when attacked in her home; A family survives shark infested waters; a restaurant manager is left for dead.

programs.title: I Survived
programs.desc: Three survivors from UA Flight 232 relive the aviation disaster; a young woman is violently assaulted by two men.

programs.title: I Survived
programs.desc: Two friends must fight for their lives when their plane goes down in the ocean; four men break into a family's home and threaten to shoot a woman in front of her daughters; a woman is abducted by an armed robber.

programs.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programs.desc: Travel blogger Carla Stefaniak goes to Costa Rica to celebrate her 36th birthday, but when she is to arrive back home in Miami, her awaiting loved ones realize she never got on the plane; Carla's friends and family recount the search to find her.
